Senior Software Engineer - Platform Team

About the Role:
We're looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform team. You'll design and implement scalable infrastructure components that power our entire product suite. This role involves working with Go, Rust, and Python across cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP), container orchestration, and distributed systems.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and implement microservices and platform components serving 100M+ requests/day
- Mentor junior engineers and lead technical architecture discussions
- Contribute to infrastructure-as-code using Terraform/CloudFormation
- Optimize system performance and reliability (aiming for 99.99% uptime)
- Participate in on-call rotation for production support
- Code review and ensure best practices across the platform

Requirements:
- 7+ years of experience in backend/platform engineering
- Strong proficiency in at least one systems language (Go, Rust, C++)
- Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS or GCP)
- Solid understanding of distributed systems, databases, and networking
- Experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes)
- Strong communication and mentoring skills

Nice-to-Have:
- Experience with databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
- Familiarity with observability tools (Datadog, Prometheus)
- Open source contributions
- Experience with capacity planning and cost optimization

Compensation & Benefits:
- Competitive salary ($180K-$240K based on experience)
- Stock options
- 401(k) matching
- Unlimited PTO
- Health, dental, vision insurance
- Home office setup
